seriess.title: 3-Month Moving Average of Unweighted Median Hourly Wage Growth: Wage Distribution: 51st to 100th Wage Percentile
seriess.notes:
Median of the year-over-year percent change in hourly wage rates computed at the individual level using linked wage records. Reported as a 3-month moving average. The 51st to 100th wage percentile is computed after sorting the average wage level in the current month and 12 months earlier. 

For more details about this release from the Federal Reserve Bank of Atlanta, visit their Wage Growth Tracker webpage (https://www.atlantafed.org/chcs/wage-growth-tracker?panel=2).
